violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Storage shelving against wall needs bare wood boards painted or stained.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Store cups that are in shed up off of floor.
